scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c blue,magenta "pnpm run dev:web" "wait-on http://localhost:21098/desktop/ && pnpm run electron:dev"
scripts.build: vite build --config vite.config.ts && pnpm run electron:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:dev: pnpm run electron:build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development VITE_DEV_URL=http://localhost:21098/desktop/ electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.electron:start: pnpm run build && pnpm run electron:build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.electron:dist: pnpm run build && pnpm run electron:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.build:full: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run electron:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux
scripts.electron:build:win: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run electron:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win
scripts.electron:build:mac: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run electron:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac
